DECLARATION OF ROBB EVANS RE:NOMINATION OF RECEIVER FILED BY PLAINTIFF MERRILL LYNCH BUSINESS FINANCIAL SERVICES INC

LAW AND MOTION 301, FOR THE APPOINTMENT OF A LIMITED PURPOSE RECEIVER OVER HANDYPERSONS INC AND A PRELIMINARY INJUNCTION IN AID OF THE RECEIVER: PLAINTIFF APPEARED. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANTS. THE COURT'S TENTATIVE RULING WAS ISSUED LATE. THEREFORE, PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL PERMITTED TO ARGUE. ARGUED AND THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING WITH THE EXCEPTION THAT THE BOND AMOUNT WILL BE $10,000.00. MOTION FOR APPOINTMENT OF RECEIVER AND PRELIMINARY INJUNCTION GRANTED. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. HON. A JAMES ROBERTSON REPORTER: PATRICIA M. EVEZICH, CSR 1193

For The Appointment Of A Limited Purpose Receiver Over Handypersons Inc And A Preliminary Injunction In Aid Of The Receiver; P&A; Declarations Of Martin Aguilera
Off Calendar May-24-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Shari D. Marks, Esq. of FRANDZEL ROBINS BLOOM & CSATO, L.C. 788-7400 for Plaintiff MERRILL LYNCH BUSINESS FINANCIAL SERVICES INC., a Delaware corporation moving party

No appearance by Defendants. The Court's tentative ruling was issued late. Therefore, Plaintiff's counsel permitted to argue. Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling with the exception that the bond amount will be $10,000.00. Motion for appointment of receiver and preliminary injunction granted. Order signed in open court. (AJR) Patricia M. Evezich, CSR 1193
